debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
⊢ U ∼ V ↔ ∃ f g, f ∘ g = id ∧ g ∘ f = id

proof:
by
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨f, h1, h2⟩
    use f, fun v => Classical.choose (h2 v)
    constructor <;> funext x
    · exact Classical.choose_spec (h2 x)
    · apply h1; exact Classical.choose_spec (h2 (f x))
  · rintro ⟨f, g, h1, h2⟩
    refine ⟨f, fun x1 x2 h => ?_, fun y => ⟨g y, ?_⟩⟩
    · change id x1 = id x2; rw [← h2]; exact congr_arg g h
    · change (f ∘ g) y = y; rw [h1]; rfl
failed_attempts:
by
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h; cases h with f hf; cases hf with h1 h2
    exists f, (fun v => Classical.choose (h2 v))
    constructor
    · funext y; exact Classical.choose_spec (h2 y)
    · funext x; apply h1; exact Classical.choose_spec (h2 (f x))
  · intro h; cases h with f h; cases h with g h; cases h with hfg hgf
    exists f
    constructor
    · intro x1 x2 heq
      rw [←congr_fun hgf x1, ←congr_fun hgf x2, heq]
    · intro y; exists g y; exact congr_fun hfg y

by
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro ⟨f, hf⟩
    let g := fun y => Classical.choose (hf.2 y)
    exists f, g
    constructor
    · funext y; exact Classical.choose_spec (hf.2 y)
    · funext x; apply hf.1; exact Classical.choose_spec (hf.2 (f x))
  · intro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    exists f
    constructor
    · intro x1 x2 heq
      have := congrArg g heq
      rw [congrFun hgf x1, congrFun hgf x2] at this
      exact this
    · intro y; exists g y; exact congrFun hfg y

by
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    rcases h with ⟨f, hbij⟩
    rcases hbij with ⟨hinj, honto⟩
    let g := λ v => Classical.choose (honto v)
    have hg : ∀ v, f (g v) = v := λ v => Classical.choose_spec (honto v)
    exists f, g
    constructor
    · funext v; exact hg v
    · funext u; apply hinj; rw [hg]
  · intro h
    rcases h with ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    exists f
    constructor
    · intro u1 u2 heq
      have := congr_arg g heq
      change (g ∘ f) u1 = (g ∘ f) u2 at this
      rw [hgf] at this
      exact this
    · intro v
      exists g v
      change (f ∘ g) v = v
      rw [hfg]
      rfl

by
  constructor
  · intro h; cases h with f hf
    exists f; exists (fun y => Classical.choose (hf.2 y))
    constructor
    · apply funext; intro y
      exact Classical.choose_spec (hf.2 y)
    · apply funext; intro x
      apply hf.1; exact Classical.choose_spec (hf.2 (f x))
  · intro h; cases h with f h1; cases h1 with g h2
    exists f
    constructor
    · intro x1 x2 heq
      rw [← congr_fun h2.2 x1, heq, congr_fun h2.2 x2]
    · intro y
      exists g y
      exact congr_fun h2.1 y

  apply Iff.intro

    refine ⟨f, λ v => Classical.choose (hf.2 v), ?_, ?_⟩
    · funext y; exact Classical.choose_spec (hf.2 y)

    constructor
    · intro x y heq; rw [← congr_fun h2 x, ← congr_fun h2 y, heq]
    · intro y; exists g y; exact congr_fun h1 y

    exists f, inverse f

  · intro h
    obtain ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩ := h
    exists f
    constructor
    · intro x1 x2 heq
      rw [← congr_fun hgf x1, heq, congr_fun hgf x2]
    · intro y
      exact ⟨g y, congr_fun hfg y⟩

by
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    cases h with f hf
    exists f; exists inverse f
    exact ⟨right_inverse_of_onto hf.right, left_inverse_of_inj hf.left⟩
  · intro h
    cases h with f h; cases h with g h; cases h with hfg hgf
    exists f
    constructor
    · intro x1 x2 heq
      have : g (f x1) = g (f x2) := by rw [heq]
      change (g ∘ f) x1 = (g ∘ f) x2 at this
      rw [hgf] at this
      exact this
    · intro y
      exists g y
      change (f ∘ g) y = y
      rw [hfg]
      rfl

by
  constructor
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨f, h1, h2⟩ := h
    let g := fun v => Classical.some (h2 v)
    exists f, g
    have hfg : f ∘ g = id := funext fun v => Classical.some_spec (h2 v)
    constructor
    · exact hfg
    · funext x
      apply h1
      change (f ∘ g) (f x) = f x
      rw [hfg]; rfl
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨f, g, h1, h2⟩ := h
    exists f
    constructor
    · intro x y hxy
      rw [←congr_fun h2 x, hxy, congr_fun h2 y]
    · intro y
      exists g y
      exact congr_fun h1 y
